briefdescription.para: Bold text.
Dim text.
Italic text.
Underlined text.
Blinking text.
Reverse foreground/background display.
Hidden text.
Strikethrough text.
The explicitly enabled attributes.
The explicitly specified attributes.
Create attributes with no explicitly specified flags.
Create attributes with one enabled flag.

parameterdescription.para: The flag to enable and specify.

briefdescription.para: Compare two attribute sets for equality.
Compare two attribute sets for inequality.
Get the enabled bit mask.
Get the specified bit mask.
Get the mask of attributes that are both specified and enabled.
Test whether a flag is explicitly specified.

simplesect.para: true if the flag is explicitly specified.

briefdescription.para: Test whether a flag is specified and enabled.

simplesect.para: true if the flag is specified and enabled.

briefdescription.para: Apply these attributes on top of a base attribute set.

detaileddescription.para:
Only explicitly specified attributes overwrite the base state.
base
The base attributes.
The resolved attribute set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Flag flag, const bool enabled) const noexcept
memberdef.name: withFlag

briefdescription.para: Create a copy with one flag explicitly enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the flag, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Get a stable hash for the attribute set.
Test if the bold attribute is specified.
Test if the bold attribute is enabled.
Test if the dim attribute is specified.
Test if the dim attribute is enabled.
Test if the italic attribute is specified.
Test if the italic attribute is enabled.
Test if the underline attribute is specified.
Test if the underline attribute is enabled.
Test if the blink attribute is specified.
Test if the blink attribute is enabled.
Test if the reverse attribute is specified.
Test if the reverse attribute is enabled.
Test if the hidden attribute is specified.
Test if the hidden attribute is enabled.
Test if the strikethrough attribute is specified.
Test if the strikethrough attribute is enabled.
Set or clear the bold attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the bold attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the dim attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the dim attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the italic attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the italic attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the underline attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the underline attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the blink attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the blink attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the reverse attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the reverse attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the hidden attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the hidden attribute inherit from the base state.
Set or clear the strikethrough attribute explicitly.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the attribute, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Make the strikethrough attribute inherit from the base state.
Create attributes from an enabled/specified mask pair.
Create a fully specified attribute mask from enabled bits.
Create a fully specified attribute set with all flags disabled.
Create a fully specified attribute set with all flags enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t enabledMask, const uint8_t specifiedMask) noexcept
memberdef.name: CharAttributes

memberdef.argsstring: (const Flag flag, const bool enabled) noexcept
memberdef.name: setFlag

briefdescription.para: A set of optional ANSI character attributes.

detaileddescription.para: Each attribute stores two states: whether it is explicitly specified and whether it is enabled. Unspecified attributes inherit the state from the surrounding writer or character below.
